title: Ripples of the Past: Extra Stands Addon
description: An addon mod that adds 4 stands for Ripples of the Past.
body:
![Extra Stands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb8269d9d657d14d708a6acd686a0d07e0e23ff0.png)An addon mod that adds 4 stands for [Ripples of the Past](https://modrinth.com/mod/ripples-of-the-past), a mod for Minecraft based on JoJo's Bizarre Adventure.
# Stands
- Aqua Necklace
- The Hand
- Kraft Work
- Stone Free
# Showcase
**Note:** All these showcases are somewhat old but they still show you how the stands of this addon work.
- [Aqua Necklace](https://youtu.be/Z6XMxcB8GRM)
- [The Hand](https://youtu.be/g70jsteYdl0)
- [Kraft Work](https://youtu.be/Ah7eRycjBec)
- [Stone Free](https://youtu.be/xUoWp7tJjG8)
